title: BEM-855 route 854
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:51 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem854_verify_response_after_writer_fix.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if ps=='response_file_present_after_writer_fix':
    status='process_response_next'
    next_action='parse BEM-844 response into final agreed/BLOCKED protocol'
elif ps=='still_no_dispatch_results':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem855_result_writer_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v16','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-855 still no dispatch results after writer fix','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify dispatch result writer'
elif ps=='still_no_runtime_state':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem855_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v16','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-855 runtime still missing after writer fix','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify runtime state'
elif ps=='runtime_seen_but_response_missing':
    status='runtime_seen_response_missing_next'
    next_action='inspect dispatcher ensure step and commit script; response file not committed or step not reached'
else:
    status='unknown_bem854_status'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-854 state'
state={'bem':'BEM-855','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem855_route_after_bem854.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem855_route_after_bem854.md').write_text('# BEM-855 | Route After BEM-854 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem855_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-855'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem855_route_after_bem854.json','governance/reports/bem855_route_after_bem854.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem855_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-854 response verification and selected next concrete step')
